name: IOVANCE BIOTHERAPEUTICS, INC.
business: Iovance Biotherapeutics is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company that develops and delivers tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (TIL) cell therapies for solid tumor cancers. The company has two commercial products: Amtagvi (lifileucel), a one-time T cell therapy for advanced melanoma, and Proleukin (aldesleukin), an IL-2 product used in the Amtagvi regimen and other applications. Revenue is generated from sales to hospitals, clinics, distributors, and authorized treatment centers in the U.S. and select international markets.

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company pioneering a transformational approach to treating cancer by harnessing the human immune system's ability to recognize and destroy diverse cancer cells using individualized therapies.

catalysts.event: Resubmission of MAA for Amtagvi in the EU
catalysts.sentence: We are working with the European Medicines Agency, or EMA, to resubmit a centralized MAA in 2026.

catalysts.event: Potential approvals in UK and Australia
catalysts.sentence: Potential approvals are pending in the United Kingdom, or UK, and Australia in the first half of 2026 and Switzerland in 2027.

catalysts.event: Commencement of registrational trial in soft tissue sarcoma
catalysts.sentence: We plan to commence a registrational trial in previously treated advanced undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma and dedifferentiated liposarcoma in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Termination of contract manufacturer agreement for Amtagvi
catalysts.sentence: Our contract manufacturer concluded production of Amtagvi and lifileucel and our agreement terminated in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of workforce reduction under strategic restructuring
catalysts.sentence: The workforce reduction of approximately 19 percent was substantially complete by end of September 30, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Amtagvi has potential to address more than 30,000 previously treated advanced melanoma patients annually globally.
tamClaims.sentence: Globally, Amtagvi has the potential to address more than 30,000 previously treated advanced melanoma patients annually.

tamClaims.claim: The i CTC has potential capacity to supply TIL cell therapies for more than 5,000 cancer patients annually.
tamClaims.sentence: The i CTC has the potential capacity to supply TIL cell therapies for more than 5,000 cancer patients annually.
